description: A designed promotional graphic (square, white background) advertising USCIS digital resources. Large bold blue centered text reads 'ONLINE TOOLS.' Arranged around the center are small thin-line icons in blue/gray, each labeled, connected by light dotted/wiggly connector lines and small decorative triangles: a location pin labeled 'LOCATORS' (top-left), a wrench/gear labeled 'SELF SERVICE TOOLS' (top), a flag labeled 'CITIZENSHIP CORNER' (right), a compass labeled 'RESEARCH TOOLS' (lower-right), and a folder/document icon labeled 'ONLINE RESOURCES' (bottom-left). Bottom-right corner shows the DHS seal and 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark. Clean, light, modern flat-icon infographic style. Messaging encourages applicants to create a free USCIS online account and use self-service tools; purely service/administrative promotion. Tweet promotes creating a free account for instant case updates (#USCISOnlineTools).
notable_text: ONLINE TOOLS; LOCATORS; SELF SERVICE TOOLS; CITIZENSHIP CORNER; RESEARCH TOOLS; ONLINE RESOURCES
